## Week in Review: 2026-05-25 to 2026-05-31

**One Nation** led search interest this week with an average score of 9.0.
The strongest combined search-and-sentiment score belonged to **One Nation**.

### Party Breakdown

- **Labor**: Avg interest 3.0 (0.0% WoW), sentiment: neutral (-0.04)
- **Liberal**: Avg interest 3.0 (+16.7% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.40)
- **Greens**: Avg interest 1.9 (+30.0% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.20)
- **One Nation**: Avg interest 9.0 (-12.5% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.15)
